zh: 同学们，欢迎你们开始八年级英语学习！
en: Students, lets welcome you into your English studies for grade eight!

zh: 这本教材专为你们的心理特征、认知能力和兴趣而设计。
en: This textbook is designed with your psychological characteristics, cognitive abilities, and interests in mind.

zh: 这本教材的主要目标是帮助你们不仅学习英语语言知识，而且发展语言技能。
en: The textbooks main goal is to help you not only learn English language knowledge but also develop your language skills.

zh: 它考虑了你们的实际生活和学习需求，将内容和活动与你们的生活和兴趣联系起来。
en: It considers your actual life and learning needs, connecting the content and activities to your life and interests.

zh: 这本教材非常重视培养你们的语言学习策略和技能。
en: The textbook places a strong emphasis on developing your language learning strategies and skills.

zh: 它包含了沟通任务和活动，以鼓励你在英语课堂上的积极参与和互动。
en: It incorporates communicative tasks and activities to encourage active participation and interaction in the English classroom.

zh: 提高英语水平需要持续的努力、练习和与老师和同学的互动。
en: Improving your English level requires continuous effort, practice, and interaction with teachers and classmates.

zh: 拓展你对文化内容的知识，包括你自己的国家文化、英语国家文化和来自其他国家的文化，将拓宽你的视野。
en: Expanding your knowledge of cultural content, including your own nations culture, Englishspeaking cultures, and cultures from other countries, will broaden your horizons.

zh: 为了在英语学习中取得成功，你必须不断地接触各种英语学习资源。
en: To succeed in learning English, you must consistently expose yourself to diverse English learning resources.

zh: 有效的学习依赖于在听、说、读、写、记忆和应用方面的一致练习。
en: Effective learning relies on consistent practice in listening, speaking, reading, writing, memorization, and application.

zh: 继续努力取得你在英语学习中的更大进步，让我们一起取得令人振奋的成果！
en: Continue striving for greater progress in your English studies, and lets achieve fantastic results together!

zh: 重要的是利用各种资源和机会来丰富你的英语学习体验。
en: It is important to utilize various resources and opportunities to enhance your English learning experience.

zh: 你多久看电视？
en: How often do you watch TV?

zh: 我每天看电视。
en: I watch TV every day.

zh: 你多久去看电影？
en: How often do you go to the movies?

zh: 我一周去两次电影院。
en: I go to the movies twice a week.

zh: 你多久锻炼？
en: How often do you exercise?

zh: 他几乎从不锻炼。
en: He hardly ever exercises.

zh: 你多久读英语书？
en: How often do you read English books?

zh: 我一周大约读两次英语书。
en: I read English books about twice a week.

zh: 你多久购物？
en: How often do you shop?

zh: 你多久喝牛奶？
en: How often do you drink milk?

zh: 我每天喝牛奶。
en: I drink milk every day.

zh: 你多久吃水果？
en: How often do you eat fruit?

zh: 我一周大约吃两次水果。
en: I eat fruit about twice a week.

zh: 你多久睡觉？
en: How often do you sleep?

zh: 我可能一个月一次睡觉。
en: I sleep maybe once a month.

zh: 汤姆比萨姆更聪明吗？
en: Is Tom smarter than Sam?

zh: 萨姆比汤姆更聪明。
en: No, he isnt. Sam is smarter than Tom.

zh: 塔拉比蒂娜更外向吗？
en: Is Tara more outgoing than Tina?

zh: 蒂娜比塔拉更外向。
en: No, she isnt. Tina is more outgoing than Tara.

zh: 你和你的姐姐一样友善吗？
en: Are you as friendly as your sister?

zh: 不，我不是。我比她更友善。
en: No, Im not. Im friendlier.

zh: 塔拉和蒂娜一样努力工作吗？
en: Does Tara work as hard as Tina?

zh: 上学谁更努力工作？
en: Whos more hardworking at school?

zh: 蒂娜认为她比我更努力。
en: Tina thinks she works harder than me.

zh: 朱莉比你高吗？
en: Is Julie as tall as you?

zh: 不，她不是。她比我高。
en: No, she isnt. Shes taller than me.

zh: 你更努力学习英语吗？
en: Do you study English harder?

zh: 不，我不。我更经常学习它。
en: No, I dont. I study it more often.

zh: 你现在比两年前更搞笑吗？
en: Are you funnier now than you were two years ago?

zh: 是的，我。我现在比两年前更搞笑。
en: Yes, I am. Im funnier now than I was two years ago.

zh: 你唱得更好吗？
en: Do you sing better?

zh: 不，我不。我还在学习。
en: No, I dont. Im still learning.

zh: 我比我的姐姐更外向。
en: Im more outgoing than my sister.

zh: 哪家服装店最好？
en: Which is the best clothes store?

zh: 这是最贵的。
en: Its the most expensive.

zh: 它有最好的衣服。
en: It has the best clothes.

zh: 这是最糟糕的商店。
en: Its the worst store.

zh: 你可以在那里买到最便宜的衣服。
en: You can buy clothes the most cheaply there.

zh: 它有最糟糕的音乐。
en: It has the worst music.

zh: DJ们最仔细地选择歌曲。
en: The DJs choose songs the most carefully.

zh: 这是最受欢迎的。
en: Its the most popular.

zh: 你好，我是格雷格。我刚来镇上。
en: Hi, Im Greg. Im new in town.

zh: 是的，阳光影院是最新的一家。
en: Yes, Sun Cinema is the newest one.

zh: 你可以最舒适地坐下，因为他们有最大的座位。
en: You can sit the most comfortably because they have the biggest seats.

zh: 镇上影院的最好的电影院是什么？
en: Whats the best movie theater to Town Cinema.

zh: 萨莉喜欢看情景喜剧和肥皂剧。
en: Sally likes to watch sitcoms and soap operas.

zh: 林惠认为她可以从情景喜剧中学习。
en: Lin Hui thinks she can learn from sitcoms.

zh: 萨莉认为新闻节目比情景喜剧更有教育意义。
en: Sally thinks news programs are more educational than sitcoms.

zh: 萨莉喜欢看访谈节目。她计划看《我们的一天》。
en: Sally loves talk shows. She plans to watch Days of Our Past.

zh: 格蕾丝无法忍受综艺节目和体育节目。
en: Grace cant stand game shows and sports shows.

zh: 格蕾丝喜欢肥皂剧并且喜欢追随剧情。
en: Grace loves soap operas and likes to follow the story.

zh: 莎拉对肥皂剧没有意见，但更喜欢新闻和访谈节目。
en: Sarah doesnt mind soap operas but prefers the news and talk shows.

zh: 格蕾丝觉得访谈节目很无聊。
en: Grace finds talk shows boring.

zh: 莎拉希望有一天成为一名电视记者。
en: Sarah hopes to be a TV reporter one day.

zh: 格蕾丝问莎拉是否想看一场综艺节目。
en: Grace asks Sarah if she wants to watch a game show.

zh: 约翰想看访谈节目，因为它们很有趣。
en: John wants to watch talk shows because theyre enjoyable.

zh: 我喜欢看动作片，因为它们很刺激。
en: I like to watch action movies because theyre exciting.

zh: 你想要长大后当什么人？
en: What do you want to be when you grow up?

zh: 我想要当一名工程师。
en: I want to be an engineer.

zh: 你打算怎么做？
en: How are you going to do that?

zh: 我要好好学习数学。
en: Im going to study math really hard.

zh: 你要在哪里工作？
en: Where are you going to work?

zh: 我要去上海。
en: Im going to move to Shanghai.

zh: 我要在高中和大学毕业后开始。
en: Im going to start when I finish high school and college.

zh: 我的朋友想要当一名工程师。
en: My friend wants to be an engineer.

zh: 我的哥哥想要当一名演员。
en: My brother wants to be an actor.

zh: 我想要当一名科学家。
en: I want to be a scientist.

zh: 我的姐姐想要当一名老师。
en: My sister wants to be a school teacher.

zh: 那些男孩想要当一名足球运动员。
en: Those boys want to be soccer players.

zh: 我和我的朋友想要当一名歌手。
en: My friend and I want to be singers.

zh: 我的表兄弟想要当一名厨师。
en: My cousin wants to be a cook.

zh: 我想要当一名赛车手。
en: I want to be a race car driver.

zh: 凯利想要当一名医生。
en: Kelly wants to be a doctor.

zh: 她要去大学学习医学。
en: Shes going to study medicine at a university.

zh: 你打算这么做吗？
en: You are going to do that?

zh: 我要在大学学习医学。
en: Im going to study medicine at a university.

zh: 这听起来很难。你也要学习吗？
en: Sounds difficult. Are you going to study?

zh: 我要去伦敦学习。
en: Im going to study in London.

zh: 你打算开始吗？
en: Are you going to start?

zh: 我要下个九月开始。
en: Im going to start next September.

zh: 我想要当一名记者。
en: I want to be a reporter.

zh: 我要写文章并寄给杂志和报纸。
en: Im going to write articles and send them to magazines and newspapers.

zh: 我想要当一名老师。
en: I want to be a teacher.

zh: 我要努力学习并取得好成绩。
en: Im going to study hard and get good grades.

zh: 未来会有更多的人。
en: There will be more people in the future.

zh: 未来会减少每个人的自由时间。
en: There will be less free time for everyone.

zh: 人们将更少地使用地铁。
en: People will use the subways less frequently.

zh: 城市会产生更多的污染。
en: There will be more pollution in the cities.

zh: 城市会非常大而且拥挤。
en: Cities will be very big and crowded.

zh: 我们可以使用更少的水，多植树。
en: We can use less water and plant more trees.

zh: 每个人都应该在拯救地球方面发挥作用。
en: Everyone should play a part in saving the earth.

zh: 人们在未来会拥有机器人吗？
en: Will people have robots in the future?

zh: 尼克认为会有更多的污染。
en: Nick thinks there will be more pollution.

zh: 吉尔相信城市会更加拥挤和污染。
en: Jill believes cities will be more crowded and polluted.

zh: 未来会有更少的树木。
en: There will be fewer trees in the future.

zh: 如果我们不采取行动，环境将会面临巨大危险。
en: The environment will be in great danger if we don't act.

zh: 我们需要多少香蕉？
en: How many bananas do we need?

zh: 我们需要三根香蕉。
en: We need three bananas.

zh: 我们需要多少酸奶？
en: How much yogurt do we need?

zh: 我们需要一杯酸奶。
en: We need one cup of yogurt.

zh: 我们来做水果沙拉吧。
en: Lets make fruit salad.

zh: 我们需要多少苹果？
en: How many apples do we need?

zh: 我们需要两只苹果。
en: We need two apples.

zh: 首先，去皮香蕉。
en: First, peel the bananas.

zh: 然后，把香蕉放入搅拌机。
en: Next, put the bananas in the blender.

zh: 接着，把牛奶倒入搅拌机。
en: Then, pour the milk into the blender.

zh: 最后，打开搅拌机。
en: Finally, turn on the blender.

zh: 杰夫不能去派对。
en: Jeff cant go to the party.

zh: 玛丽不能去派对。
en: Mary cant go to the party.

zh: 梅不能去派对。
en: May cant go to the party.

zh: 美玲不能去派对。
en: Mei Ling cant go to the party.

zh: 保罗不能去派对。
en: Paul cant go to the party.

zh: 我很抱歉，我不能参加。
en: Im sorry, Im not available.

zh: 我这个周末作业太多了。
en: I have too much homework this weekend.

zh: 真糟糕，也许下次再见。
en: Thats too bad, maybe another time.

zh: 好的，乔，谢谢邀请。
en: Sure, Joe, thanks for asking.

zh: 我很想来，但我不能。
en: Id love to come, but I cant.

zh: 我周一有考试，所以必须准备。
en: I have an exam on Monday so I must prepare for it.

zh: 你能来我的派对吗？
en: Can you come to my party?

zh: 这些天学生常常有很多烦恼。
en: The students these days often have a lot of worries.

zh: 有时他们有学业上的问题，有时有朋友之间的关系问题。
en: Sometimes they have problems with their schoolwork, and sometimes with their friends.

zh: 他们能怎么办呢？
en: What can they do about this?

zh: 如果你去参加派对，你一定会玩得很开心！
en: If you go to the party, youll have a great time!

zh: 如果你加入狮子俱乐部，你就会出名了。
en: If you join the Lions, youll be famous.

zh: 如果你成为狮子，我永远不会这样做。
en: If you become a Lion, Ill never do it.

zh: 如果你努力工作，你就会成为一名优秀的足球运动员。
en: If you work really hard, youll become a great soccer player.

zh: 如果你成为足球运动员，你将永远不上大学。
en: If you become a soccer player, youll never go to college.

zh: 如果我现在不做这件事，你就会环游世界。
en: If I dont do this now, youll travel around the world.

zh: 如果你上大学，你将永远不会成为一名优秀的足球运动员。
en: If you go to college, youll never become a great soccer player.

zh: 如果你应该向专家寻求建议。
en: If you should get advice from an expert.

zh: 如果人们有麻烦，他们应该和别人谈谈。
en: If people have problems, they should talk to other people.
